title: [spec-compliance] routing.rs TrickleSafeLiveness hardcoded timeout differs from RPL trickle Imin in constants.toml and draft-lichen-rpl-lora
description: The TrickleSafeLiveness uses fixed 10000ms grace period (added in 6596ea225 and 830bf061f). Spec appendix-rpl.md and constants.toml[rpl.trickle].imin_ms=4000, RFC 6206 §4.2 and LICHEN RPL draft require liveness tied to Imin/Imax/k without arbitrary 10s constant. This risks inconsistent neighbor pruning vs spec MUST for Trickle suppression handling. See version_cmp also has custom (0,127) case not explicitly in RFC6550 §7.2.
